---
title: "Question 4 - Worker efficiency with block and machine effects"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
alpha <- 0.05
```

## Question

Compare the efficiency of workers A, B, C and D using the given block x machine layout.

```{r data}
# Data transcribed from the image exactly as shown
# (Block I has A twice and no D in the provided table)
df <- data.frame(
  Block = factor(rep(c("I", "II", "III", "IV", "V", "VI"), each = 4)),
  Machine = factor(rep(c("M1", "M2", "M3", "M4"), times = 6)),
  Worker = factor(c(
    "C", "A", "B", "A",
    "A", "B", "C", "D",
    "A", "C", "D", "B",
    "A", "D", "C", "B",
    "B", "C", "A", "D",
    "D", "C", "A", "B"
  )),
  Yield = c(
    22, 14, 12, 23,
    16, 18, 20, 25,
    15, 23, 28, 14,
    17, 21, 19, 11,
    18, 20, 13, 24,
    18, 21, 10, 17
  )
)

df
table(df$Block, df$Worker)
aggregate(Yield ~ Worker, data = df, FUN = mean)
```

## Analysis

```{r models}
# Compare reduced and full models to isolate worker effect
reduced <- lm(Yield ~ Block + Machine, data = df)
full <- lm(Yield ~ Block + Machine + Worker, data = df)
comparison <- anova(reduced, full)
comparison
```

```{r decision}
p_worker <- comparison[2, "Pr(>F)"]

if (p_worker < alpha) {
  cat("Decision: Reject H0 at 5% significance level.\n")
  cat("Conclusion: Worker efficiency differs significantly after adjusting for block and machine effects.")
} else {
  cat("Decision: Fail to reject H0 at 5% significance level.\n")
  cat("Conclusion: No significant worker-efficiency difference is detected after adjustment.")
}
```
